title: Superpowers: Zenith Protocol
description: A massive endgame expansion that lets you trade Ancient Tokens to unlock, equip, and master unique superpowers across 25 Gem paths.
body:
STILL IN ACTIVE DEVELOPMENT - EXPECT ISSUES AND CONFLICTS WITH DIFFERENT ABILITIES, I AM TRYING TO REFINE THEM AS BEST I CAN.

🌟 Overview
Have you ever felt like vanilla endgame just doesn't offer enough raw power? Zenith Protocol bridges that gap. By combining an intense boss-farming economy with a deeply customizable class system, you can mix and match abilities to create the ultimate superhero build.

Whether you want to call down Orbital Strikes, manipulate Gravity, harness Ancient Runic magic, or assimilate the DNA of the world's creatures, the choice is yours.

💎 Getting Started (Survival Guide)
You won't find these powers buried in dirt. Superpowers must be earned.

Right-clicking a Blank Gem will unlock your Potential to absorb other gems with superpowers. 

Find the Blank Gems in Ancient Cities or End City Chests.

The Gem Trader: Place a Block of Amethyst near an unemployed Villager to hire the Gem Trader.

The Economy: Defeat the Wither! The Gem Trader only accepts Nether Stars as currency.

The Gamble: Trade for a Blank Power Gem to begin your journey, or buy Unidentified Geodes to roll the dice on unlocking random Power Gems.

The Guide: Check the in-game Gem Index to read up on your new abilities, learn how to extract gems, and track your Masteries.

⚙️ Core Features
23 Unique Elements: Master classic elements like Fire, Lightning, and Frost, or bend reality with Time, Space (Ender), Gravity, Force (Jedi), and Flora magic.

88 Active Abilities: A massive arsenal of combat, utility, mobility, and team-support skills.

Sleek Custom UIs: Press R to open your Ability Loadout Manager. Equip exactly 10 active abilities to your hotbar and manage your passive/core powers. The dynamic HUD tracks your cooldowns and toggle states (ON/OFF/READY) in real-time.

Mastery System: Using an ability earns you progression points. Hit 1,000 points to Master a gem, unlocking permanent passive buffs (like Fire Resistance, Fall Immunity, or Apex Chimera health boosts) and devastating ultimate attacks.

🚀 Spotlight Mechanics
Smart Dimension Hopping (Ender): Tear rifts through space. Stand normally to teleport to the Nether, or Sneak to visit the End. The mod safely scans for landing pockets so you never suffocate in walls, and remembers your exact Overworld base coordinates for your return trip!

DNA Assimilation (Druid): Scan mobs in the world to catalog their DNA in your Druid Menu (Press H). Shift into their aspect to gain their unique traits—like Enderman teleportation, Spider wall-climbing, or Creeper detonations.

Deflection Stance (Jedi): Enter a focused stance that automatically drains your energy to physically deflect incoming arrows, fireballs, and tridents right back at your attackers.

🤝 Multiplayer & Team Synergy
Playing with friends? The mod features a built-in Team Manager in the Loadout Menu.

Friendly Fire Protection: Teammates cannot hurt each other with massive AoE attacks.

Team Support: Cast AoE heals on your friends, deploy Sanctuary Domes for invulnerability, or use the Guardian Gem to locate and teleport to teammates in danger.

👑 The Zenith Protocol
For the ultimate completionist. If you manage to collect and imprint all 23 unique Power Gems, you will trigger the Zenith Protocol. This grants a permanent 15% Cooldown Reduction to every ability in the game, alongside permanent resistance buffs and a cosmetic demigod aura.

📥 Dependencies
Fabric API (Required)

(Note: Modpacks and servers are 100% free to use this mod!)
